title: ORIUS: Program-first thesis solidification follow-up
summary: Track the remaining work after the Papers 1-6 master audit so the canonical thesis stays program-first, bounded, and evidence-linked.
acceptance: Paper 1 remains the sole reference proof witness; Papers 2-6 stay bounded by role; frontier rows stay separate from program completeness.

title: ORIUS: Keep thesis narrative consistent with the program-first Paper 1-6 structure
summary: Keep paper/paper.tex and the core thesis chapters aligned to the same Paper 1-6 role split.
acceptance: No battery-first future roadmap language; Paper 1-6 roles match across introduction, roadmap, contribution boundary, and conclusion.

title: ORIUS: Maintain the Papers 1-6 audit and evidence register as the canonical control surface
summary: Keep the program audit synchronized with repo truth and preserve the reference-vs-bounded claim classes.
acceptance: Every paper row has theorem or contract class, code status, test status, reproducibility status, artifact status, and thesis narrative status.

title: ORIUS: Preserve the retrospective program-architecture roadmap and remove stale future-work framing
summary: Protect chapters/ch23_research_roadmap.tex as a retrospective architecture chapter, not a speculative roadmap.
acceptance: No reintroduction of publish battery first, second domain, third domain, or similar framing.

title: ORIUS: Track open frontier rows separately from the completed Papers 1-6 program
summary: Keep AV, navigation, and aerospace tracked as frontier rows instead of blending them into Papers 1-6 completeness.
acceptance: No frontier row is promoted without matching code, tests, artifacts, and explicit bounded claim updates.
